title: dev report
description: The developer agent's structured result for one implementation round. `commits` is rewritten by the WORKER to the real branch head after it commits the round's work — an agent-asserted hash never survives.

summary.description: What was changed and why, concretely — the reviewers read this.

commits.description: Filled by the worker with the real commit hashes; leave empty.

acceptance_claims.description: One entry per brief acceptance criterion: how the diff meets it. Claims are checked adversarially, never trusted.

deviations.description: Every departure from the brief's scope or stated approach, declared. Undeclared deviations are what the reviewers hunt.
